original: Pulling the pin on a grenade without a target to throw it at would be pretty dumb now, wouldn’t it?
e.capitalA+e.short+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.
g.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1)+" produces an EM Popper and hucks it in the direction of "+a.getCombatName()+"!",null,t
